title: Bingo Brought a Live Armadillo Inside. The Family Lost It.
script: Nobody invited this armadillo! In Allen, Oklahoma, Alycia Napier's dog Bingo made a delivery nobody ordered: one live armadillo, waddling straight through the front door. The family security camera caught all of it. Kids scattered across the front lawn — screaming, running, full panic mode. Bingo trotted back outside, ears up, proud of himself. Without the armadillo. Which was now loose inside the house. Napier coaxed Bingo back in, and the dog — bless him — actually found the armadillo and carried it back out. Dropped it at the edge of the yard. The armadillo, completely unbothered, scurried into the neighbor's yard. Nobody asked it to leave. So: was this a gift, or was Bingo just trying to make friends?
